name: VCAPCD Rule 74.19 Graphic Arts (and 74-series VOC rules)
what_it_does: Sets ROC/VOC content limits, add-on control, and work-practice requirements for graphic-arts / printing operations and related solvent cleaning in Ventura County.

hypotheses.question: Do VCAPCD graphic-arts / solvent-cleaning VOC rules (74-series) impose content limits or controls on the operation?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: VCAPCD Rule 74.19 (graphic arts) and related 74-series rules may impose ROC/VOC content limits and work practices even if a Rule 10 permit is not required.
